items.text: You've successfully managed systems processing 8M events per day with 99.95% uptime. Can you walk me through the specific architectural decisions and AWS services you used to achieve this scale, and what strategies you would implement to scale from 8M to 10M+ events per day?

You have hands-on experience with both Kafka and SQS for event-driven architecture. For our high-throughput event processing system, can you compare these two technologies and explain which scenarios would lead you to choose one over the other, particularly in the context of AWS infrastructure?

As a team lead of 5 engineers, you established coding standards and conducted code reviews. Can you describe a specific situation where you had to balance technical debt against feature delivery, and how you mentored a team member who was struggling with PostgreSQL query optimization?

You've worked extensively with FastAPI and Django. For a new microservice that needs to handle real-time event processing with strict latency requirements, which framework would you choose and why? What specific performance optimizations would you implement?

Given your Terraform certification and AWS Solutions Architect Associate certification, can you describe how you've used infrastructure-as-code to manage ECS deployments and RDS instances? What observability and monitoring patterns did you implement with tools like Datadog to support your on-call rotation?

Dear Jean Martin,

Thank you for your interest in the position and for taking the time to submit your application.

After careful review, we regret to inform you that your profile does not fully align with the requirements for this role at this time.

Jean Martin is not a suitable candidate for the Senior Backend Engineer position. He is a graphic designer with 2 years of experience in visual design, branding, and UI mockups, with no backend development experience whatsoever. The role requires 5+ years of professional backend development with Python, AWS, PostgreSQL, microservices architecture, and team leadership experience - none of which are present in his CV. His technical skills are limited to design tools (Figma, Adobe Suite) and basic HTML/CSS for static pages. This is a complete mismatch between a creative design profile and a senior technical engineering role. The only minor alignment is that he speaks French (a plus for the role) and has some collaborative experience, but these are insufficient given the fundamental skill gap.

We encourage you to apply for future openings that may better match your qualifications.

Best regards,
HR Team

text.text:
# JOB OFFER - Senior Backend Engineer ## About TechForward TechForward Inc. is a fast-growing SaaS company building the next generation of supply-chain optimization tools. Our platform processes millions of transactions daily and serves Fortune 500 clients worldwide. We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Core Platform team in Paris. ## Position Details
Title Senior Backend Engineer
Department Core Platform
Location Paris, France (hybrid - 3 days on-site)
Contract Full-time, permanent (CDI)
Salary Range 65 000 - 85 000 EUR gross/year
Start Date As soon as possible
## Required Qualifications В· 5+ years of professional backend development experience В· Strong proficiency in Python (Django or FastAPI preferred) В· Hands-on experience with distributed systems and microservices architecture В· Production experience with AWS services (ECS, Lambda, SQS, S3, RDS) В· Deep knowledge of PostgreSQL - query optimization, schema design, migrations В· Experience leading a team of 3+ engineers (code reviews, mentoring, sprint planning) В· Fluent in English; French is a plus ## Nice to Have В· AWS Solutions Architect or Developer Associate certification В· Experience with Terraform or infrastructure-as-code В· Contributions to open-source projects В· Knowledge of event-driven architecture (Kafka, RabbitMQ) ## Responsibilities В· Design, build, and maintain scalable backend services processing 10M+ daily events В· Own the technical roadmap for the data ingestion pipeline . Lead a squad of 4 engineers - set standards, review PRs, unblock teammates

В· Collaborate with Product and Data Science teams on feature delivery

В· Participate in on-call rotation and incident response

В· Drive adoption of best practices: testing, CI/CD, observability


## Benefits

В· Equity package (BSPCE)

. 25 days PTO + RTT

В· Meal vouchers (Swile)

В· 50% Navigo reimbursement

В· Health insurance (Alan)

В· Annual learning budget of 1 500 EUR

To apply, send your CV and a short cover letter to jobs@techforward.io.

text.text:
# JOB OFFER - Senior Backend Engineer ## About TechForward TechForward Inc. is a fast-growing SaaS company building the next generation of supply-chain optimization tools. Our platform processes millions of transactions daily and serves Fortune 500 clients worldwide. We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Core Platform team in Paris. ## Position Details
Title Senior Backend Engineer
Department Core Platform
Location Paris, France (hybrid - 3 days on-site)
Contract Full-time, permanent (CDI)
Salary Range 65 000 - 85 000 EUR gross/year
Start Date As soon as possible
## Required Qualifications В· 5+ years of professional backend development experience В· Strong proficiency in Python (Django or FastAPI preferred) В· Hands-on experience with distributed systems and microservices architecture В· Production experience with AWS services (ECS, Lambda, SQS, S3, RDS) В· Deep knowledge of PostgreSQL - query optimization, schema design, migrations В· Experience leading a team of 3+ engineers (code reviews, mentoring, sprint planning) В· Fluent in English; French is a plus ## Nice to Have В· AWS Solutions Architect or Developer Associate certification В· Experience with Terraform or infrastructure-as-code В· Contributions to open-source projects В· Knowledge of event-driven architecture (Kafka, RabbitMQ) ## Responsibilities В· Design, build, and maintain scalable backend services processing 10M+ daily events В· Own the technical roadmap for the data ingestion pipeline . Lead a squad of 4 engineers - set standards, review PRs, unblock teammates

В· Collaborate with Product and Data Science teams on feature delivery

В· Participate in on-call rotation and incident response

В· Drive adoption of best practices: testing, CI/CD, observability


## Benefits

В· Equity package (BSPCE)

. 25 days PTO + RTT

В· Meal vouchers (Swile)

В· 50% Navigo reimbursement

В· Health insurance (Alan)

В· Annual learning budget of 1 500 EUR

To apply, send your CV and a short cover letter to jobs@techforward.io.

items.text: You've successfully managed systems processing 8M events per day with 99.95% uptime. Can you walk me through the specific architectural decisions and AWS services you used to achieve this scale, and what strategies you would implement to scale from 8M to 10M+ events per day?

Given your Terraform certification and AWS Solutions Architect Associate certification, can you describe how you've used infrastructure-as-code to manage ECS deployments and RDS instances? What observability and monitoring patterns did you implement with tools like Datadog to support your on-call rotation?

# MARIE DUPONT Senior Backend Engineer paris@mariedupont.dev . +33 6 12 34 56 78 . linkedin.com/in/mariedupont . github.com/mdupont ## Professional Summary Backend engineer with 7 years of experience building high-throughput Python services on AWS. AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate. Led a cross-functional team of 5 engineers delivering microservices that process 8M events/day. Passionate about clean architecture, observability, and mentoring junior developers. ## Technical Skills
Languages Python (expert), Go (intermediate), SQL, Bash
Frameworks FastAPI, Django, Flask, SQLAlchemy, Celery
Databases PostgreSQL (advanced - partitioning, query tuning), Redis, DynamoDB
Cloud / Infra AWS (ECS, Lambda, SQS, SNS, S3, RDS, CloudWatch), Terraform, Docker
Tools Git, GitHub Actions, Datadog, Grafana, Sentry, Kafka
## Professional Experience Lead Backend Engineer - DataPulse SAS, Paris March 2022 - Present (3 years) В· Led a team of 5 engineers building a real-time data ingestion platform on AWS ECS + SQS В· Designed and implemented a microservices architecture processing 8M events/day with 99.95% uptime В· Reduced PostgreSQL query latency by 40% through index optimization and table partitioning В· Established code review standards, CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions), and on-call rotation В· Mentored 2 junior engineers who were promoted within 18 months ### Backend Engineer - CloudMetrics, Paris September 2019 - February 2022 (2.5 years) В· Built FastAPI services for a B2B analytics platform serving 200+ enterprise clients В· Migrated monolithic Django app to microservices, reducing deploy time from 45 min to 8 min В· Implemented event-driven workflows with AWS Lambda and SQS for async report generation В· Owned PostgreSQL schema design and wrote migration tooling used across the engineering org ### Junior Python Developer - WebFactory, Lyon June 2017 - August 2019 (2 years) В· Developed REST APIs with Django REST Framework for e-commerce clients В· Wrote unit and integration tests achieving 90%+ code coverage В· Introduced Docker-based local development, adopted by the full team

## Education

MSc Computer Science - INSA Lyon, 2017


## Certifications

В· AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (2023)

В· HashiCorp Terraform Associate (2022)


## Languages

French (native), English (fluent - C1)

text.text:
# JOB OFFER - Senior Backend Engineer ## About TechForward TechForward Inc. is a fast-growing SaaS company building the next generation of supply-chain optimization tools. Our platform processes millions of transactions daily and serves Fortune 500 clients worldwide. We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Core Platform team in Paris. ## Position Details
Title Senior Backend Engineer
Department Core Platform
Location Paris, France (hybrid - 3 days on-site)
Contract Full-time, permanent (CDI)
Salary Range 65 000 - 85 000 EUR gross/year
Start Date As soon as possible
## Required Qualifications В· 5+ years of professional backend development experience В· Strong proficiency in Python (Django or FastAPI preferred) В· Hands-on experience with distributed systems and microservices architecture В· Production experience with AWS services (ECS, Lambda, SQS, S3, RDS) В· Deep knowledge of PostgreSQL - query optimization, schema design, migrations В· Experience leading a team of 3+ engineers (code reviews, mentoring, sprint planning) В· Fluent in English; French is a plus ## Nice to Have В· AWS Solutions Architect or Developer Associate certification В· Experience with Terraform or infrastructure-as-code В· Contributions to open-source projects В· Knowledge of event-driven architecture (Kafka, RabbitMQ) ## Responsibilities В· Design, build, and maintain scalable backend services processing 10M+ daily events В· Own the technical roadmap for the data ingestion pipeline . Lead a squad of 4 engineers - set standards, review PRs, unblock teammates

В· Collaborate with Product and Data Science teams on feature delivery

В· Participate in on-call rotation and incident response

В· Drive adoption of best practices: testing, CI/CD, observability


## Benefits

В· Equity package (BSPCE)

. 25 days PTO + RTT

В· Meal vouchers (Swile)

В· 50% Navigo reimbursement

В· Health insurance (Alan)

В· Annual learning budget of 1 500 EUR

To apply, send your CV and a short cover letter to jobs@techforward.io.

data.text:
Dear Jean Martin,

Thank you for your interest in the position and for taking the time to submit your application.

After careful review, we regret to inform you that your profile does not fully align with the requirements for this role at this time.

Jean Martin is not a suitable candidate for the Senior Backend Engineer position. He is a graphic designer with 2 years of experience in visual design, branding, and UI mockups, with no backend development experience whatsoever. The role requires 5+ years of professional backend development with Python, AWS, PostgreSQL, microservices architecture, and team leadership experience - none of which are present in his CV. His technical skills are limited to design tools (Figma, Adobe Suite) and basic HTML/CSS for static pages. This is a complete mismatch between a creative design profile and a senior technical engineering role. The only minor alignment is that he speaks French (a plus for the role) and has some collaborative experience, but these are insufficient given the fundamental skill gap.

We encourage you to apply for future openings that may better match your qualifications.

Best regards,
HR Team

# JOB OFFER - Senior Backend Engineer ## About TechForward TechForward Inc. is a fast-growing SaaS company building the next generation of supply-chain optimization tools. Our platform processes millions of transactions daily and serves Fortune 500 clients worldwide. We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Core Platform team in Paris. ## Position Details
Title Senior Backend Engineer
Department Core Platform
Location Paris, France (hybrid - 3 days on-site)
Contract Full-time, permanent (CDI)
Salary Range 65 000 - 85 000 EUR gross/year
Start Date As soon as possible
## Required Qualifications В· 5+ years of professional backend development experience В· Strong proficiency in Python (Django or FastAPI preferred) В· Hands-on experience with distributed systems and microservices architecture В· Production experience with AWS services (ECS, Lambda, SQS, S3, RDS) В· Deep knowledge of PostgreSQL - query optimization, schema design, migrations В· Experience leading a team of 3+ engineers (code reviews, mentoring, sprint planning) В· Fluent in English; French is a plus ## Nice to Have В· AWS Solutions Architect or Developer Associate certification В· Experience with Terraform or infrastructure-as-code В· Contributions to open-source projects В· Knowledge of event-driven architecture (Kafka, RabbitMQ) ## Responsibilities В· Design, build, and maintain scalable backend services processing 10M+ daily events В· Own the technical roadmap for the data ingestion pipeline . Lead a squad of 4 engineers - set standards, review PRs, unblock teammates

В· Collaborate with Product and Data Science teams on feature delivery

В· Participate in on-call rotation and incident response

В· Drive adoption of best practices: testing, CI/CD, observability


## Benefits

В· Equity package (BSPCE)

. 25 days PTO + RTT

В· Meal vouchers (Swile)

В· 50% Navigo reimbursement

В· Health insurance (Alan)

В· Annual learning budget of 1 500 EUR

To apply, send your CV and a short cover letter to jobs@techforward.io.

data.summary: Jean Martin is not a suitable candidate for the Senior Backend Engineer position. He is a graphic designer with 2 years of experience in visual design, branding, and UI mockups, with no backend development experience whatsoever. The role requires 5+ years of professional backend development with Python, AWS, PostgreSQL, microservices architecture, and team leadership experience - none of which are present in his CV. His technical skills are limited to design tools (Figma, Adobe Suite) and basic HTML/CSS for static pages. This is a complete mismatch between a creative design profile and a senior technical engineering role. The only minor alignment is that he speaks French (a plus for the role) and has some collaborative experience, but these are insufficient given the fundamental skill gap.

You are an experienced HR recruiter. Analyze the following CV and job offer, then evaluate how well the candidate matches the position.

## Job Offer
@job_pages

## Candidate CV
@cv_pages

## Instructions
- Extract the candidate name from the CV
- Assess whether the candidate is a good match (yes/no) based on required qualifications, experience, and skills
- Provide a match score from 0 to 100
- List key strengths relevant to the position
- List gaps or missing qualifications
- Write a concise overall summary of the evaluation

{{ evaluation.summary }}

We encourage you to apply for future openings that may better match your qualifications.

Best regards,
HR Team
